title: Operator Console — fleet view, new-tenant wizard, audit log at /admin
problem: Marc operates a fleet of buyer instances and needs one page that shows it all green at a glance: every tenant's domain, template + version, last activity, billing state, uptime, SSL status. Plus a "Provision new buyer" wizard that turns the conversation "I'd like to buy SND" into a live tenant in under 5 minutes (form → tenants insert → CF Pages API domain-add → magic link sent → audit log entry). Plus an append-only audit log so future-Marc can answer "why did I freeze tenant X in March?" The console lives at lifeascode.app/admin, gated by an operator-email allowlist (Marc only initially). This is the page Marc opens daily to confirm the side-practice is running itself.
